title: Extreme Worldgen
description: This datapack modify the terrain generation and most of trees
body:
![Extreme worldgen](https://i.imgur.com/0boohnr.png)

This datapack "Extreme worldgen" change the default vanilla minecraft generator terrain.

**Mountains are more realistics, caves are way more extreme, and nether is way more difficult, even with and open celling.**

**Extreme worldgen changes the default trees too, to more big trees.**

**Two new biomes added, maple forest and samurai garden.**
![two new biomes](https://i.imgur.com/xhPC289.png)

**Nether more overworld like terrain.**
![nether extreme](https://i.imgur.com/b0ojJe3.png)
